mapper.select:
SELECT dp.price_id AS priceId, dp.drug_id AS drugId, COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price) AS purchasePrice, COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price) AS retailPrice, dp.member_price AS memberPrice, dp.promo_price AS promoPrice, dp.promo_start AS promoStart, dp.promo_end AS promoEnd, dp.operator, dp.update_time AS updateTime, d.drug_name, d.specification FROM drug_info d LEFT JOIN drug_price dp ON d.drug_id = dp.drug_id WHERE d.status = 1
AND d.drug_id = #{drugId}
AND (d.drug_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.generic_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY d.drug_name

SELECT dp.price_id AS priceId, dp.drug_id AS drugId, COALESCE(dp.purchase_price, d.purchase_price) AS purchasePrice, COALESCE(dp.retail_price, d.retail_price) AS retailPrice, dp.member_price AS memberPrice, dp.promo_price AS promoPrice, dp.promo_start AS promoStart, dp.promo_end AS promoEnd, dp.operator, dp.update_time AS updateTime, d.drug_name, d.specification FROM drug_info d LEFT JOIN drug_price dp ON d.drug_id = dp.drug_id WHERE d.drug_id = #{drugId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO drug_price (price_id, drug_id, purchase_price, retail_price, member_price, promo_price, promo_start, promo_end, operator, update_time) VALUES (#{priceId}, #{drugId}, #{purchasePrice}, #{retailPrice}, #{memberPrice}, #{promoPrice}, #{promoStart}, #{promoEnd}, #{operator}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE drug_price SET purchase_price = #{purchasePrice}, retail_price = #{retailPrice}, member_price = #{memberPrice}, promo_price = #{promoPrice}, promo_start = #{promoStart}, promo_end = #{promoEnd}, operator = #{operator}, update_time = NOW() WHERE drug_id = #{drugId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_history (history_id, drug_id, price_type, old_price, new_price, change_rate, adjust_type, batch_no, effective_date, reason, operator, create_time) VALUES (#{historyId}, #{drugId}, #{priceType}, #{oldPrice}, #{newPrice}, #{changeRate}, #{adjustType}, #{batchNo}, #{effectiveDate}, #{reason}, #{operator}, NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE drug_info SET
purchase_price = ROUND(purchase_price * (1 + #{adjustRate}), 2)
retail_price = ROUND(retail_price * (1 + #{adjustRate}), 2)
WHERE drug_id IN
#{drugId}
